finding: The previous .yap export had a visible Add others button and a separate Add assignee form action, but the exported button binding pointed to the Reject action placeholder instead of the Add assignee action placeholder.

updatedExportCorrection.finding: The updated .ywf export corrects the Add others button binding so it resolves to the Add assignee action.

validatorRecommendation: Warn when action_button labels imply approve/reject/reassign/add/complete but attrs.control_action points to a form action whose Submit form operation does not match the label.
